---
title: "R code publication"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Contemporary suitability map

```{r}
library(terra)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(sf)
library(here)

in_tif  <- here("Proj_current_unknown.species_maxent_cloglog.tif")
out_png <- here("current_suitability.png")

r <- rast(in_tif)

# Breaks & labels
brks <- c(0, seq(0.1, 1.0, by = 0.1))
labs <- c("0.00–0.10","0.10–0.20","0.20–0.30","0.30–0.40",
          "0.40–0.50","0.50–0.60","0.60–0.70","0.70–0.80",
          "0.80–0.90","0.90–1.00")
cols <- rev(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(10, "Spectral"))

# Clamp to [0,1]
eps <- sqrt(.Machine$double.eps)
r <- terra::clamp(r, lower = 0 - eps, upper = 1 + eps, values = TRUE)
r <- terra::app(r, \(v) pmin(pmax(v, 0), 1))

# Bin to categories (1..10)
rcat <- app(r, \(v) as.integer(cut(v, brks, include.lowest = TRUE, right = FALSE)))
rcat <- as.factor(rcat)
levs <- levels(rcat)
levs[[1]] <- data.frame(value = 1:10, label = labs)
levels(rcat) <- levs
coltab(rcat) <- data.frame(value = 1:10, color = cols)

# Get Australian state boundaries
aus_states <- ne_states(country = "Australia", returnclass = "sf") |>
  st_make_valid()

# Convert to terra vector format and project to match raster CRS
aus_states_v <- project(vect(aus_states), crs(rcat))

# Calculate centroids for labels
centroids <- st_coordinates(st_centroid(aus_states))

# Create state abbreviations
state_names <- aus_states$name
state_abbrev <- c(
  "New South Wales" = "NSW",
  "Victoria" = "VIC",
  "Queensland" = "QLD",
  "South Australia" = "SA",
  "Western Australia" = "WA",
  "Tasmania" = "TAS",
  "Northern Territory" = "NT",
  "Australian Capital Territory" = "ACT"
)

labels_text <- state_abbrev[state_names]

# Create plot
png(out_png, width = 2400, height = 1800, res = 250, bg = "white")
par(mar = c(4, 4, 2, 12), bg = "white")

plot(rcat, type = "classes", col = cols, 
     axes = FALSE,
     legend = FALSE
)

legend(
  x = 151,
  y = -8.5,
  legend = labs,
  fill = cols,
  title = "Relative suitability\n(cloglog)",
  xpd = NA,
  cex = 1.15,
  bty = "n"
)

# Add state boundaries
lines(aus_states_v, col = "gray30", lwd = 1.5)

# Create adjustment vectors for each state
lon_adjust <- c(
  "NSW" = -4,      # No adjustment for NSW
  "VIC" = 0,      # No adjustment for VIC
  "QLD" = 0,      # No adjustment for QLD
  "SA" = 0,       # No adjustment for SA
  "WA" = 0,       # No adjustment for WA
  "TAS" = 0,      # No adjustment for TAS
  "NT" = 0,       # No adjustment for NT
  "ACT" = 0     # Move ACT 1.5 degrees east (example)
)

lat_adjust <- c(
  "NSW" = 2,      # No adjustment for NSW
  "VIC" = 0.22,      # No adjustment for VIC
  "QLD" = 0,      # No adjustment for QLD
  "SA" = 0,       # No adjustment for SA
  "WA" = 0,       # No adjustment for WA
  "TAS" = 0,      # No adjustment for TAS
  "NT" = 0,       # No adjustment for NT
  "ACT" = -0.5    # Move ACT 0.5 degrees south (example)
)

# Apply adjustments
adjusted_lon <- centroids[, 1] + lon_adjust[labels_text]
adjusted_lat <- centroids[, 2] + lat_adjust[labels_text]

# Add state labels with manual adjustments
text(adjusted_lon, adjusted_lat, labels = labels_text, 
     cex = 1.0, font = 2, col = "white")

# Add Torres Strait Islands label outside plot region
text(x = 142.5, y = -9.0, labels = "Torres Strait\nIslands", 
     cex = 0.85, font = 2, col = "gray20", xpd = TRUE)
# Add Torres Strait Islands label outside plot region
text(x = 130.5, y = -10.3, labels = "Tiwi Islands", 
     cex = 0.85, font = 2, col = "gray20", xpd = TRUE)

# Add axes with degree labels
ex  <- ext(rcat)
lon <- pretty(c(ex[1], ex[2]), n = 6)
lat <- pretty(c(ex[3], ex[4]), n = 6)

deg_lab_lon <- function(x) paste0(abs(x), "°", ifelse(x < 0, "W", "E"))
deg_lab_lat <- function(x) paste0(abs(x), "°", ifelse(x < 0, "S", "N"))

axis(1, at = lon, labels = deg_lab_lon(lon), las = 1, cex.axis = 0.9, 
     tick = FALSE, line = 0)
axis(2, at = lat, labels = deg_lab_lat(lat), las = 1, cex.axis = 0.9,
     tick = FALSE, line = 0)

dev.off()
```

## Four climate change maps

```{r}
library(terra)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(sf)
library(rmapshaper)
library(here)

tif_paths <- here(c(
  "future_2_2050.tif",
  "future_2_2090.tif",
  "future_3_2050.tif",
  "future_3_2090.tif"
))
panel_titles <- c(
  "SSP2-4.5 (2040–2059)",
  "SSP3-7.0 (2040–2059)",
  "SSP2-4.5 (2080–2099)",
  "SSP3-7.0 (2080–2099)"
)
out_png <- here("suitability_4panel_masked_fast.png")

brks <- c(0, seq(0.1, 1.0, by = 0.1))
labs <- c("0.00–0.10","0.10–0.20","0.20–0.30","0.30–0.40",
          "0.40–0.50","0.50–0.60","0.60–0.70","0.70–0.80",
          "0.80–0.90","0.90–1.00")
cols <- rev(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(10, "Spectral"))
r_list <- lapply(tif_paths, rast)
tmpl   <- r_list[[1]]
align_layer <- function(x, tmpl) {
  x <- if (!compareGeom(x, tmpl, stopOnError = FALSE)) {
    xt <- if (crs(x) != crs(tmpl)) project(x, crs(tmpl), method = "bilinear") else x
    resample(xt, tmpl, method = "bilinear")
  } else x
  x
}
r_list  <- lapply(r_list, align_layer, tmpl = tmpl)
r_stack <- rast(r_list)
aus_sf <- ne_countries(country = "Australia", scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") |>
  st_make_valid() |>
  rmapshaper::ms_simplify(keep = 0.10, keep_shapes = TRUE)
aus_v  <- project(vect(aus_sf), crs(r_stack))
mask_r <- rasterize(aus_v, r_stack[[1]], field = 1, touches = TRUE)
eps <- sqrt(.Machine$double.eps)
r_stack <- clamp(r_stack, lower = 0 - eps, upper = 1 + eps, values = TRUE)
r_stack <- app(r_stack, \(v) pmin(pmax(v, 0), 1))
r_stack <- mask(r_stack, mask_r)
rcat <- app(r_stack, \(v) as.integer(cut(v, brks, include.lowest = TRUE, right = FALSE)))
rcat <- as.factor(rcat)
lvl_df <- data.frame(value = 1:10, label = labs)
levels(rcat) <- lapply(levels(rcat), function(.) lvl_df)
ctab <- data.frame(value = 1:10, color = cols)
for (i in 1:nlyr(rcat)) coltab(rcat[[i]]) <- ctab
# Plot 2×2 with a SINGLE shared legend
png(out_png, width = 2800, height = 1900, res = 220, bg = "white")
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 5,
                3, 4, 5), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
       widths = c(1, 1, 0.3))
par(mar = c(2.5, 1, 2.5, 0.1))
for (i in 1:nlyr(rcat)) {
  plot(rcat[[i]],
       type   = "classes",
       col    = cols,
       axes   = TRUE,
       legend = FALSE,
       box    = FALSE,
       mar    = c(3, 1, 1, 0.1),
       plg    = list(x = "right"))
  
  title(panel_titles[i], cex.main = 1.6, line = 1)
}
# Create legend panel
par(fig = c(0, 1, 0, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 0, 0), mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0), new = TRUE)
plot(0, 0, type = 'n', bty = 'n', xaxt = 'n', yaxt = 'n')

legend(x = 1.05,          
       y = 0.3,           
       legend = labs, 
       fill = cols, 
       border = "black",
       cex = 1.7,         
       bty = "n",
       title = "Relative suitability (cloglog)",
       xpd = NA,          
       xjust = 1,         
       x.intersp = 0.5,   
       y.intersp = 1.2)

dev.off()
```

## Continuous range change map for one scenario

```{r}
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(viridis)
library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(here)

options(scipen = 999)
terra::terraOptions(memfrac = 0.8)

current_projection <- here("Proj_current_JEV_maxent_cloglog2.tif")
future_projection <- here("future_3_2090.tif")
output_dir <- here("output")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

cat("Loading rasters...\n")
current_rast <- rast(here(current_projection))
future_rast <- rast(here(future_projection))

if (!compareGeom(current_rast, future_rast, stopOnError = FALSE)) {
  cat("Rasters don't align perfectly. Resampling future to match current...\n")
  future_rast <- resample(future_rast, current_rast, method = "bilinear")
}

cat("\n\n=== CONTINUOUS CHANGE ANALYSIS ===\n")

suitability_change <- future_rast - current_rast

writeRaster(suitability_change,
            file.path(output_dir, "suitability_change_continuous.tif"),
            overwrite = TRUE)

cat("\nSuitability change statistics:\n")
change_stats <- global(suitability_change, fun = c("min", "max", "mean", "sd"), na.rm = TRUE)
print(change_stats)

cat("\n\n=== Creating Figures ===\n")

australia <- ne_countries(country = "australia", returnclass = "sf", scale = "medium")

# Get Australian state boundaries
aus_states <- ne_states(country = "Australia", returnclass = "sf") |>
  st_make_valid()

# Convert to terra vector format and project to match raster CRS
aus_states_v <- project(vect(aus_states), crs(suitability_change))

# Calculate centroids for labels
centroids <- st_coordinates(st_centroid(aus_states))

# Create state abbreviations
state_names <- aus_states$name
state_abbrev <- c(
  "New South Wales" = "NSW",
  "Victoria" = "VIC",
  "Queensland" = "QLD",
  "South Australia" = "SA",
  "Western Australia" = "WA",
  "Tasmania" = "TAS",
  "Northern Territory" = "NT",
  "Australian Capital Territory" = "ACT"
)
labels_text <- state_abbrev[state_names]

lon_adjust <- c(
  "NSW" = -4,

"VIC" = 0,
  "QLD" = 0,
  "SA" = 0,
  "WA" = 0,
  "TAS" = 0,
  "NT" = 0,
  "ACT" = 0
)

lat_adjust <- c(
  "NSW" = 2,
  "VIC" = 0.22,
  "QLD" = 0,
  "SA" = 0,
  "WA" = 0,
  "TAS" = 0,
  "NT" = 0,
  "ACT" = -0.5
)

adjusted_lon <- centroids[, 1] + lon_adjust[labels_text]
adjusted_lat <- centroids[, 2] + lat_adjust[labels_text]

#Continuous change with state boundaries
cat("Creating Figure 4: Continuous change...\n")

png(file.path(output_dir, "Figure_4_continuous_change.png"),
    width = 2400, height = 1800, units = "px", res = 300, bg = "white")

par(mar = c(4, 4, 3, 10), bg = "white")

plot(suitability_change,
     col = colorRampPalette(c("#4575b4", "#91bfdb", "#ffffbf", "#fc8d59", "#d73027"))(100),
     legend = TRUE,
     axes = FALSE,
     box = FALSE,
     plg = list(
       title = "Δ Suitability",
       x = "middleright",
       xpd = TRUE,
       inset = c(-0.12, 0),
       cex = 0.85,
       bty = "n"
     ))

# Add state boundaries
lines(aus_states_v, col = "gray30", lwd = 1.5)

# Add state labels
text(adjusted_lon, adjusted_lat, labels = labels_text, 
     cex = 0.9, font = 2, col = "gray30")

# Add axes with degree labels
ex <- ext(suitability_change)
lon <- pretty(c(ex[1], ex[2]), n = 6)
lat <- pretty(c(ex[3], ex[4]), n = 6)

deg_lab_lon <- function(x) paste0(abs(x), "°", ifelse(x < 0, "W", "E"))
deg_lab_lat <- function(x) paste0(abs(x), "°", ifelse(x < 0, "S", "N"))

axis(1, at = lon, labels = deg_lab_lon(lon), las = 1, cex.axis = 0.9, 
     tick = FALSE, line = 0)
axis(2, at = lat, labels = deg_lab_lat(lat), las = 1, cex.axis = 0.9,
     tick = FALSE, line = 0)

dev.off()

cat("Figure 4 saved.\n")
```

## Four continuous range change maps

```{r}
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(viridis)
library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(here)

# Set options ------------------------------------------------------------------
options(scipen = 999)
terra::terraOptions(memfrac = 0.8)

# File paths -------------------------------------------------------------------
current_projection <- here("Proj_current_JEV_maxent_cloglog2.tif")

# Define four future scenarios
future_scenarios <- list(
  list(file = here("future_2_2050.tif"), label = "SSP2-4.5 (2040-2059)"),
  list(file = here("future_2_2090.tif"), label = "SSP2-4.5 (2080-2099)"),
  list(file = here("future_3_2050.tif"), label = "SSP3-7.0 (2040-2059)"),
  list(file = here("future_3_2090.tif"), label = "SSP3-7.0 (2080-2099)")
)

output_dir <- here("output")
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Load current raster ----------------------------------------------------------
cat("Loading current raster...\n")
current_rast <- rast(current_projection)

# Load Australia boundaries ----------------------------------------------------
aus_states <- ne_states(country = "Australia", returnclass = "sf") |>
  st_make_valid()
aus_states_v <- project(vect(aus_states), crs(current_rast))

# Create state abbreviations and label positions
centroids <- st_coordinates(st_centroid(aus_states))
state_names <- aus_states$name
state_abbrev <- c(
  "New South Wales" = "NSW",
  "Victoria" = "VIC",
  "Queensland" = "QLD",
  "South Australia" = "SA",
  "Western Australia" = "WA",
  "Tasmania" = "TAS",
  "Northern Territory" = "NT",
  "Australian Capital Territory" = "ACT"
)
labels_text <- state_abbrev[state_names]

lon_adjust <- c("NSW" = -4, "VIC" = 0, "QLD" = 0, "SA" = 0, 
                "WA" = 0, "TAS" = 0, "NT" = 0, "ACT" = 0)
lat_adjust <- c("NSW" = 2, "VIC" = 0.22, "QLD" = 0, "SA" = 0, 
                "WA" = 0, "TAS" = 0, "NT" = 0, "ACT" = -0.5)
adjusted_lon <- centroids[, 1] + lon_adjust[labels_text]
adjusted_lat <- centroids[, 2] + lat_adjust[labels_text]

# Process all scenarios and find global min/max for consistent colour scale ---
cat("Processing all scenarios...\n")
change_rasters <- list()
global_min <- Inf
global_max <- -Inf

for (i in seq_along(future_scenarios)) {
  scenario <- future_scenarios[[i]]
  cat(paste0("  Loading ", scenario$label, "...\n"))
  
  future_rast <- rast(scenario$file)
  
  if (!compareGeom(current_rast, future_rast, stopOnError = FALSE)) {
    future_rast <- resample(future_rast, current_rast, method = "bilinear")
  }
  
  change_rast <- future_rast - current_rast
  change_rasters[[i]] <- change_rast
  
  # Update global range
  stats <- global(change_rast, fun = c("min", "max"), na.rm = TRUE)
  global_min <- min(global_min, stats$min)
  global_max <- max(global_max, stats$max)
}

# Make symmetric around zero for diverging palette
max_abs <- max(abs(global_min), abs(global_max))
zlim <- c(-max_abs, max_abs)

cat(paste0("Global change range: ", round(global_min, 3), " to ", round(global_max, 3), "\n"))
cat(paste0("Using symmetric limits: ", round(-max_abs, 3), " to ", round(max_abs, 3), "\n"))

# Define colour palette
change_cols <- colorRampPalette(c("#4575b4", "#91bfdb", "#ffffbf", "#fc8d59", "#d73027"))(100)

# Create 2x2 figure with shared legend -----------------------------------------
cat("Creating combined figure...\n")

png(file.path(output_dir, "Figure_climate_scenarios_2x2.png"),
    width = 3600, height = 3000, units = "px", res = 300, bg = "white")

# Layout: 2x2 grid with space for legend on right
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 5,
                3, 4, 5), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
       widths = c(1, 1, 0.3),
       heights = c(1, 1))

par(mar = c(2, 3, 3, 1), bg = "white")

# Get extent for axes
ex <- ext(current_rast)
lon <- pretty(c(ex[1], ex[2]), n = 4)
lat <- pretty(c(ex[3], ex[4]), n = 4)
deg_lab_lon <- function(x) paste0(abs(x), "°", ifelse(x < 0, "W", "E"))
deg_lab_lat <- function(x) paste0(abs(x), "°", ifelse(x < 0, "S", "N"))

# Plot each scenario
for (i in seq_along(future_scenarios)) {
  plot(change_rasters[[i]],
       col = change_cols,
       range = zlim,
       legend = FALSE,
       axes = FALSE,
       box = FALSE,
       main = future_scenarios[[i]]$label,
       cex.main = 1.8)
  
  # Add state boundaries
  lines(aus_states_v, col = "gray30", lwd = 1)
  
  # Add state labels
  
  
  #text(adjusted_lon, adjusted_lat, labels = labels_text, 
   #    cex = 0.7, font = 2, col = "gray30")
  
  # Add axes
  axis(1, at = lon, labels = deg_lab_lon(lon), las = 1, cex.axis = 0.7, 
       tick = FALSE, line = -1)
  axis(2, at = lat, labels = deg_lab_lat(lat), las = 1, cex.axis = 0.7,
       tick = FALSE, line = -1)
}

# Add shared legend in the 5th panel -------------------------------------------
par(mar = c(4, 1, 4, 3))
plot.new()
plot.window(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = zlim)

# Draw colour bar
legend_breaks <- seq(zlim[1], zlim[2], length.out = 101)
rect(0.2, head(legend_breaks, -1), 0.5, tail(legend_breaks, -1),
     col = change_cols, border = NA)
rect(0.2, zlim[1], 0.5, zlim[2], border = "gray30", lwd = 1)

# Add horizontal tick lines at 0.2 increments
tick_positions <- seq(floor(zlim[1] * 5) / 5, ceiling(zlim[2] * 5) / 5, by = 0.2)
tick_positions <- tick_positions[tick_positions >= zlim[1] & tick_positions <= zlim[2]]

for (tick in tick_positions) {
  segments(x0 = 0.5, y0 = tick, x1 = 0.6, y1 = tick, col = "gray30", lwd = 1)
}

# Add tick labels
text(x = 0.65, y = tick_positions, labels = sprintf("%.1f", tick_positions),
     adj = 0, cex = 2)

# Add legend title above the legend
text(x = 0.42, y = zlim[2] + (max_abs * 0.15), labels = "Δ Suitability",
     cex = 1.8, font = 2, xpd = TRUE)

dev.off()

cat("Combined figure saved to:", file.path(output_dir, "Figure_climate_scenarios_2x2.png"), "\n")
```

## Jackknife 

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

regularized_training_gain <- 1.6258

jackknife_data <- data.frame(
  variable = c("Bioclim_05", "Bioclim_06", "Bioclim_08", 
               "Bioclim_17", "Bioclim_18"),
  without = c(1.5242, 1.3937, 1.5536, 1.5822, 1.4930),
  with_only = c(0.6083, 1.0081, 0.5239, 0.4708, 0.4205)
)

jackknife_data$variable <- factor(jackknife_data$variable,
                                  levels = c("Bioclim_18", "Bioclim_17", "Bioclim_08", 
                                           "Bioclim_06", "Bioclim_05"),
                                  labels = c("Bio18", "Bio17", "Bio08", 
                                           "Bio06", "Bio05"))

all_vars_row <- data.frame(
  variable = factor("All variables", levels = c("All variables", "Bio18", "Bio17", "Bio08",
                                               "Bio06", "Bio05")),
  without = NA,
  with_only = NA
)


ggplot() +
  geom_col(data = jackknife_data, aes(x = variable, y = without, fill = "Without variable"), width = 0.5) +
  geom_col(data = jackknife_data, aes(x = variable, y = with_only, fill = "With only variable"), width = 0.3) +
  geom_col(data = all_vars_row, aes(x = variable, y = regularized_training_gain, fill = "With all variables"), width = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = jackknife_data, 
            aes(x = variable, y = without, label = sprintf("%.2f", without)),
            hjust = 1.1, size = 3.5, color = "white") +
  geom_text(data = jackknife_data, 
            aes(x = variable, y = with_only, label = sprintf("%.2f", with_only)),
            hjust = 1.1, size = 3.5, color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = all_vars_row, 
            aes(x = variable, y = regularized_training_gain, label = sprintf("%.2f", regularized_training_gain)),
            hjust = 1.1, size = 3.5, color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Without variable" = "#453947FF", 
                               "With only variable" = "#A4BED5FF",
                               "With all variables" = "#72874EFF")) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Climate variable",
       y = "Regularized training gain",
       fill = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA))

ggsave("jackknife_plot.png", width = 8, height = 4, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```
